title: abutilon eggelingii
intro: Abutilon eggelingii, also known as the Eggeling's cotton bush, is a flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon eggelingii include its ability to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Abutilon eggelingii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
